health_conditions: cervical and lumbar vertebral issues (recommended for surgery)

benefits.description: Resolved neuropathy in left arm and avoided spinal surgery through combination of BPC-157, TB-500, supplements, probiotics, red light therapy, stretching, and physical therapy
Brought great relief and spared him from vertebral replacement surgery

protocol_notes: Combined peptides with supplements, probiotics, red light therapy, daily stretching, and physical therapy. Also cut sugar and caffeine for a month. Used Function Health blood test and Viome gut health test.
